clis.description: Inspect connected CLI devices, endpoints, and directly discovered models.
clis.empty: No CLI devices have registered yet.
clis.title: CLIs, Endpoints, and Models

attachments.expired: An attached image has expired. Remove it and attach the image again to continue.
attachments.maxReached: You can attach up to {{count}} images per message.
attachments.quotaExceeded: You've reached your media storage quota, so some images couldn't be uploaded. Let existing uploads expire, or send a smaller image.
attachments.rejected: {{count}} image(s) could not be attached. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF under 2 MB after compression.
attachments.requestLargeWarning: This request is large because prior images are re-sent each turn. It may be slow.
attachments.requestTooLarge: This request is too large to send. Remove some images or start a new thread.
attachments.signFailed: Could not prepare uploaded images for sending. Check your connection and try again.
attachments.unsupported: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF.

description: Operate connected CLIs, model pools, credentials, and relay metadata.

endpoints.empty: No endpoints have registered for this CLI.

metadata.deleteDescription: This deletes only metadata owned by your account. It does not edit local CLI endpoint configuration.
metadata.typePrompt: Type the shown value to confirm

pools.addMemberDescription: Add one of your direct discovered models to this pool.
pools.createDescription: Create an OpenAI-compatible pooled model ID.
pools.deleteDescription: Deleting this pool also removes its members and grants.
pools.description: Create pooled model IDs and share pools with exact email grants.
pools.editDescription: Update the pool slug, display name, or description.
pools.exactEmailOnly: Enter the collaborator's exact email. This does not search or suggest users.
pools.grantDescription: Share this pool with a user by exact email match only.
pools.invalidSlug: Use lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, or dots. Slugs cannot start or end with a separator and cannot contain slashes.
pools.name: Name
pools.noDirectModels: No direct models are available to add.
pools.removeMemberDescription: This model will no longer receive traffic through the pool.
pools.revokeGrantDescription: This user will lose access to the pool model ID.
pools.title: Pools and Grants
pools.typeModelId: Type the model ID to confirm
pools.typePoolName: Type the pool name to confirm

relay.deleteRangeDescription: Delete your own relay metadata created before this date. Prompts, completions, images, and bodies are not shown here.
relay.deleteRowDescription: Delete this metadata row from your account.
relay.description: Review non-content relay metadata and delete your own rows or date ranges.
relay.empty: No relay metadata has been recorded yet.
relay.title: Relay Metadata
relay.typeRelayId: Type the relay row ID to confirm

title: Dashboard

tokens.cliDescription: Create and revoke product-native CLI tokens. Raw secrets are shown only once.
tokens.createCliDescription: Use this token to register a CLI. Store the secret now.
tokens.createModelApiDescription: Choose whether this OpenAI-compatible token can access every visible model or only selected models.
tokens.modelApiDescription: Create OpenAI-compatible API tokens for visible direct models and pools.
tokens.name: Name
tokens.oneTimeSecretHelp: This raw secret is shown once and cannot be recovered later.
tokens.revokeDescription: The token will stop working immediately. Existing clients must be updated to use another token.
tokens.typeTokenName: Type the token name to confirm
